identity.name: KOLO
identity.mission: The most beautiful mobile CRM for real estate agents

theme.strategy: Dark Mode Only (No Light Mode Toggle)
theme.ios_adaptation: Use Safe Area Insets, Native System Fonts, and iOS Physics

font_family.main: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif

mobile_first.viewport: max-w-[430px] mx-auto min-h-screen bg-[#0B0B0F] relative shadow-2xl overflow-hidden

cards.default: bg-[#14141A] rounded-[24px] border border-white/5 p-5 shadow-sm

buttons.primary: bg-[#7C3AED] hover:bg-[#8B5CF6] text-white h-14 rounded-full font-semibold text-[17px] w-full shadow-[0_0_20px_-5px_rgba(124,58,237,0.5)] active:scale-95 transition-transform
buttons.secondary: bg-white/10 hover:bg-white/15 text-white h-14 rounded-full font-medium w-full backdrop-blur-sm

inputs.default: bg-white/5 border border-white/10 rounded-2xl h-14 px-5 text-white placeholder:text-zinc-500 focus:border-[#7C3AED] focus:ring-1 focus:ring-[#7C3AED] transition-all outline-none

bottom_nav.container: fixed bottom-0 left-0 right-0 h-[84px] bg-[#0B0B0F]/90 backdrop-blur-xl border-t border-white/5 flex justify-around items-start pt-4 pb-[env(safe-area-inset-bottom)] z-50

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly follow the Dark Mode ONLY theme. Do not implement a light mode.
Use the Mobile First layout strategy: The app should look like an iPhone app even on desktop (centered container).
Implement the bottom tab bar navigation for the authenticated state.
The 'Subscribe' page is critical - make it look trustworthy with high-contrast text and secure payment icons.
Use Lucide-React icons with stroke width 1.5px for that thin iOS look.
For charts (if any), use Recharts with the purple primary color.
universal_guidelines: Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients. DO NOT use dark colors as gradients
Don't make generic centered layouts, simplistic gradients, and uniform styling.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur)
You MUST NOT apply universal transition. Eg: transition: all. This results in breaking transforms. Always add transitions for specific interactive elements like button, input excluding transforms
You MUST NOT center align the app container, ie do not add .App { text-align: center; } in the css file. This disrupts the human natural reading flow of text
Always use modern button styles like pill-shaped, or sharp button with interaction animations & color relevant to the app style
NEVER: use AI assistant Emoji characters like 🤖🧠💭💡🔮 etc for icons.
Every interaction needs micro-animations - hover states, transitions, parallax effects, and entrance animations. Static = dead.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable. Cramped designs look cheap.
Subtle grain textures, noise overlays, custom cursors, selection states, and loading animations: separates good from extraordinary.
Main agent relies on these image URLs. Missing categories = main agent will use placeholder text which is FORBIDDEN
